summary: Logo upload feature testing completed. All 14 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified: dropzone, file input, preview, remove button all working correctly.

minor.issue: Cache-Control header set to 'public, max-age=86400' in code but Cloudflare CDN overrides to 'no-store, no-cache'. Not a bug - CDN behavior.

issues: Minor React console warning about controlled/uncontrolled input - not user-facing

critical_code_review_comments: Logo upload API correctly validates file types (PNG, JPG, SVG, WebP only) and rejects .txt, .pdf
Logo upload API correctly validates file size (max 2MB) and rejects larger files
Logo upload requires authentication (returns 403 without token)
Logo serving is public (no auth needed) - correct for tags
Logo URL is saved to both institution settings and theme settings
Frontend dropzone has proper drag & drop support with visual feedback
Frontend file input correctly restricts to image types via accept attribute
Frontend shows logo preview and 'Odstranit logo' button when logo is set
context_for_next_testing_agent: Logo upload feature fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_logo_upload.py with 14 tests covering: auth requirement, file type validation (PNG/JPG/SVG/WebP allowed, txt/pdf rejected), file size validation (2MB max), logo serving (public), logo URL persistence to institution and theme settings. Frontend UI verified: dropzone with drag & drop, file input with correct accept types, logo preview, remove button.

verified_features.feature: POST /api/settings/logo/upload accepts multipart file and returns {logo_url, message}
Logo upload validates file type (only PNG, JPG, SVG, WebP allowed - rejects .txt, .pdf)
Logo upload validates file size (max 2MB - rejects larger files)
Logo upload requires auth (returns 403 without token)
GET /api/settings/logo/{path} serves the uploaded image with correct content-type
Logo serving is public (no auth needed - used in tags)
Frontend Settings > Správa instituce shows logo upload dropzone with drag & drop support
Frontend shows logo preview after upload
Frontend shows 'Odstranit logo' button when logo is set
Frontend file input accepts only image types
Regression: Login still works with refresh token
Regression: Admin dashboard loads correctly after login
